generated_oml:
instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    desc "Analytical reports generated from stored data"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    desc "Saves vehicle state and object track data to SQL database",
    IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    desc "Detection of lead vehicle using cloud-based processing"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    desc "Calculation of speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandOffloading : DTDFVocab:Action [
    desc "Offloading of actuation commands to cloud infrastructure",
    IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    desc "Remote enable or disable of Adaptive Cruise Control",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    desc "Setting desired speed for ACC via remote UI",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    desc "Sending emergency braking command remotely",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via UI data saving and report generation",
    provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    desc "Offloads ACC lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands to cloud infrastructure",
    provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandOffloading
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, desired speed setting, and emergency braking commands through UI",
    provides ACCEnableDisable, DesiredSpeedSetting, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware-accelerated processing",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication",
    enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    desc "SQL database for structured storage",
    enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom DepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for collecting point cloud data",
    producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera with IMU for ego vehicle speed and steering angle data",
    producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data",
    fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5
]

instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    desc "Raw depth camera and IMU data",
    fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    desc "Processed ego vehicle speed and steering angle",
    fromData DepthCameraRawData,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    desc "Tracked objects from LiDAR point cloud processing",
    fromData LidarRawData,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5, SQLDatabase
]

instance DataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    desc "Structured storage of object tracks and ego vehicle state in SQL database",
    fromData ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData,
    inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    desc "Processes raw LiDAR data into object tracks",
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system for vehicle control functions",
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5, ROS2Middleware
]

instance VedderSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor voltage commands"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    desc "Motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    desc "Control panel for remote management commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    contains HokuyoLiDAR, DepthCamera, VedderSpeedController, Motor, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    contains NVIDIAJetpack5, ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase, PointCloudClusteringModel, ACCModel, DataStorage
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    contains ThreeDVisualizationUI, ControlPanelUI
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation are generated by the Controlling FE and processed through Data Translation. Control signals are transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP protocol to physical actuators. The Control Panel User Interface FE provides the interface for inputting control commands. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, which is less stringent than the stricter-than-100 ms requirements of safety-critical vehicular standards due to hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The Physical Twin Entity departs from the standard by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) and is deployed on different hardware than the Digital Twin and User Entities, with all entities coordinated via 100 ms clock synchronization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Data Translation handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion for all data streams. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Complies with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an example for implementing data collection and device control functional entities."
]
